name: Plum Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
Plums can be found from May to August. Choose rich colored ones ranging from fairly firm to slightly soft. Avoid hard, shriveled, poorly colored, soft, bruised, or split plums.
Halve and pit the plums and combine in a wide mouth quart jar with vodka (gin may be used) and sugar syrup. Add cinnamon. Cover and invert the jar daily until the sugar is dissolved (about 4 days). Store in a cool, dark place for 3 months. Shake gently occasionally. Strain before serving.
Yield: 3 cups plus Container: Wide mouth quart jar
